description: This pipeline processes image and data by first outputting it from a compartment, then applying various operations such as tracking spots, setting annotations, and further processing the tracks, ultimately resulting in multiple outputs including tracked data and processed images.

3399e3f8-346f-488f-b404-207a46b3ec05.name: annotate-set-single
3399e3f8-346f-488f-b404-207a46b3ec05.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

20f5d3ad-76fb-4b8b-8c5c-ebe8564c6ed1.name: trackmate-tracking
20f5d3ad-76fb-4b8b-8c5c-ebe8564c6ed1.description:
Track spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
